description: Shipkit for POCs, side projects, and rapid iteration

Vision & Discovery.name: shipkit-product-definition
Vision & Discovery.desc: Define what to build (features, patterns, differentiators)

Vision & Discovery.name: shipkit-design-system
Vision & Discovery.desc: Scaffold tiered design system — principles, tokens, aesthetic direction from project context

Vision & Discovery.name: shipkit-stage
Vision & Discovery.desc: Define project stage, constraints, and graduation criteria

Vision & Discovery.name: shipkit-metrics
Vision & Discovery.desc: Capture metric values for goal evaluation

Spec & Planning.name: shipkit-spec-roadmap
Spec & Planning.desc: Prioritize spec backlog from definitions + goals

Spec & Planning.name: shipkit-feedback-bug
Spec & Planning.desc: Process feedback into investigated bug specs

Spec & Planning.name: shipkit-thinking-partner
Spec & Planning.desc: Think through decisions with cognitive frameworks

Orchestration.name: shipkit-orch-direction
Orchestration.desc: Direction loop — strategic artifacts + coherence review

Orchestration.name: shipkit-orch-shipping
Orchestration.desc: Shipping loop — implementation + verification + release gate

Quality & Communication.name: shipkit-semantic-qa
Quality & Communication.desc: Semantic QA for API/LLM outputs and UI screenshots

Quality & Communication.name: shipkit-qa-visual
Quality & Communication.desc: Visual QA with Playwright: UI goals + autonomous test generation

System.name: shipkit-update
System.desc: Install or update Shipkit from GitHub

orchestrators.name: shipkit-orch-master-agent
orchestrators.desc: Master loop orchestrator — sequential dispatch of direction/planning/shipping

orchestrators.name: shipkit-orch-direction-agent
orchestrators.desc: Direction loop orchestrator — strategic artifact dispatch + review cycle

orchestrators.name: shipkit-orch-planning-agent
orchestrators.desc: Planning loop orchestrator — definition/spec dispatch + review cycle

orchestrators.name: shipkit-orch-shipping-agent
orchestrators.desc: Shipping loop orchestrator — implementation/verification dispatch + review cycle

producers.name: shipkit-visionary-agent
producers.desc: Strategic visionary — sets stage, vision, constraints, business goals

producers.name: shipkit-product-owner-agent
producers.desc: Product manager — definitions, specs, feedback, product goals

producers.name: shipkit-architect-agent
producers.desc: Engineering manager — architecture, plans, engineering goals

reviewers.name: shipkit-reviewer-shipping-agent
reviewers.desc: Shipping judgment — implementation quality + QA dispatch
